asset_name: Floor, Timer, and Echo Counter Header (320x64 static)
shared_properties: The header occupies a 320x64 px band centered at the top of the screen for floor number, timer, and Echo reserve count.
Core palette metadata remains primary #C9A84C, background #0D0B14, and accent #D4682A while text-support colors stay inside specs.colors_hex.
The silhouette uses restrained deco trim so it remains legible without overpowering the main puzzle field.
differences: The header contains three reserved data zones: floor index, elapsed time, and Echo reserve icons.
A narrow amber divider line separates the floor label from the timer slot to avoid visual merging during long sessions.
The right-side reserve slot is sized for two 20x30 px Echo icons and a small numeric backup indicator.

reference_images.label: gdd_markdown
reference_images.purpose: Grounds floor display, timer placement, and Echo reserve count feedback.

reference_images.label: moodboard
reference_images.purpose: Grounds the restrained art deco HUD band used for session-level information.

reference_images.label: umbra_character
reference_images.purpose: Grounds Echo icon scale relative to other HUD data.

bevy_constraints.bundle_strategy: SpriteBundle or ImageBundle on the HUD overlay camera.
bevy_constraints.asset_loading: Load the floor-timer header during FloorLoading and register it for the persistent HUD frame.
runtime_notes: Center the widget at the top of the screen and keep 24 px safe margins from the viewport edge.
Use runtime text inside the reserved floor and timer windows while the decorative frame remains static art.
Keep the header on the overlay camera so it remains stable during world panning.

context.usage: Top-center HUD frame for floor progression, elapsed time, and remaining Echo resources.

layout_notes: Floor label zone width is 92 px.
Echo reserve zone width is 80 px.

acceptance_criteria: Header texture is exactly 320x64 px and preserves three clearly separated information zones.
Timer and floor label slots remain readable over the brightest beam-heavy floors.
Echo reserve area cleanly supports two icon positions and a compact numeric fallback.
